note: The daily task writes one queue file per day (e.g. 2026-06-30.json) listing YouTube videos/courses to transcribe. fetch_transcripts.py reads files matching YYYY-MM-DD.json, pulls transcripts via the API, and sets each item's status to 'done'.

videos.title: Beginners Guide To Amazon FBA Online Arbitrage in 2026 (Free Course)
videos.why: Dec-2025 free full-course format; the manifest prefers long courses and this is the newest complete OA course found that isn't already ingested

videos.title: Storefront Stalking is NOT a Profitable Sourcing Method | Amazon FBA Sourcing Tutorial
videos.why: Contrarian counterweight: the corpus now holds several pro-storefront-stalking sources; this argues the method's weaknesses, which the brain needs for a balanced view

videos.title: Live Online Arbitrage Sourcing: Storefront Stalking Tutorial | Amazon FBA Sourcing
videos.why: Live sourcing session showing the actual click-path of storefront stalking; live sessions ground the theory transcripts with real decision-making
